summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Developer Role, Bot Training Center, and Password Reset features. All 18 backend tests PASSED. All frontend tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: 1. Developer user seeded on startup with email dev@fakulti.com / dev2026
2. Developer sidebar shows only 'Configuración' and 'Centro de Entrenamiento'
3. Admin sidebar correctly hides 'Configuración' and 'Centro de Entrenamiento'
Bot Training Center implementation is correct:
1. GET/PUT /api/bot-training/global-config works for developer only (403 for admin)
2. Knowledge base CRUD endpoints work for developer only
3. Bot test console POST /api/bot-training/test works for developer only
4. DevPanelPage has 4 tabs: Entrenamiento Bot, Base de Conocimiento, Consola de Pruebas, Gestión de Accesos
1. Forgot password for admin shows 'La solicitud fue enviada al desarrollador del sistema'
2. Forgot password for advisor shows 'La solicitud fue enviada al Administrador del sistema'
3. Developer can reset admin passwords via /api/auth/reset-password-direct
4. Admin can reset advisor passwords via /api/auth/reset-password-direct
6. Advisors page shows Reset button with Key icon for each advisor
7. DevPanelPage Gestión de Accesos tab shows pending reset requests and admin list
seed_data_creation: Developer user seeded on startup. Test knowledge base entries created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Developer role fully tested. Key verified features: 1) Developer login with dev@fakulti.com/dev2026 returns role=developer, 2) Developer sees only Configuración and Centro de Entrenamiento in sidebar, 3) Admin does NOT see these menu items, 4) Bot training global config CRUD works for developer only, 5) Knowledge base CRUD works for developer only, 6) Bot test console works for developer only, 7) Forgot password shows correct role-based messages, 8) Developer can reset admin passwords, 9) Admin can reset advisor passwords but NOT admin passwords, 10) Advisors page has Reset button for each advisor.

knowledge_base.crud_flow: PASS - POST, GET, PUT, DELETE all work for developer
knowledge_base.admin_blocked: PASS - All endpoints return 403 for admin

forgot_password.admin_message: PASS - Shows 'La solicitud fue enviada al desarrollador del sistema'
forgot_password.advisor_message: PASS - Shows 'La solicitud fue enviada al Administrador del sistema'

frontend_sidebar.developer_sidebar: PASS - Shows only Configuración and Centro de Entrenamiento
frontend_sidebar.admin_sidebar: PASS - Does NOT show Configuración or Centro de Entrenamiento

dev_panel_page.four_tabs: PASS - Entrenamiento Bot, Base de Conocimiento, Consola de Pruebas, Gestión de Accesos
dev_panel_page.bot_training_form: PASS - All fields present and editable
dev_panel_page.knowledge_base_tab: PASS - Add button and entry list
dev_panel_page.passwords_tab: PASS - Shows pending requests and admin list

advisors_page.reset_button: PASS - Reset button with Key icon visible for each advisor
